Hi {SU name}/Team, Thank you for reaching out. I understand your confusion. I'm happy to clarify. Please note, tickets do not need to be submitted when you are out of stock in an item on an order as it is not our policy to cancel orders due to low stock. If you cannot ship this order by the current must ship by date please delay it in Customer Orders > Dropship Orders. The order was sent to you as your inventory feed showed availability at the time the order was placed. Please make sure that your inventory feed is regular and correct, to prevent future negative customer experiences. Our Partner Home Help Center offers instructions on how to delay an order, please see this article: https://partners.wayfair.com/help/2/article/1440 Thanks again for reaching out. This ticket is now marked as complete. If you do need further support with this issue, please add a comment to re-open. Help us improve by sharing your feedback. You will receive an email shortly with a survey, or you can provide feedback on any closed tickets in Partner Home. We sincerely value your partnership. Kind Regards,

Applicable SOPs: Product Out of Stock SOP (DSC2S) - VCN
Text: Hello [supplier name], Thank you for reaching out regarding this PO’s status. We appreciate your consideration for our mutual customer. I can review this order with you today. PO (PO#) was marked as having shipped under tracking (Tracking#). I have noted this PO did not ship and issued a refund to our mutual customer. Moving forward, please ensure your team is not marking a PO as shipped or submitting an ASN prior to a PO shipping as this will cancel any outstanding pickups and prevent you from submitting an order delay if there is an issue with stock. Additionally, we have a system for you to be able to notify the customer automatically when at item is discontinued. In the future, you can locate the order in question on Partner Home under Dropship Orders, and please select Submit Order Delay >> Out of Stock >> Item is Discontinued. This will cancel the item. Please ensure you update the inventory feed to reflect this product option as discontinued and work with your inventory contact for further questions on this process. We want to make sure all your concerns are heard, so if this issue persists, please feel free to reach back out in this thread, and I will be happy to further assist. Otherwise, if I've resolved your concerns for the time being, I hope you have a great day! Help us improve by sharing your feedback. You will receive an email shortly with a survey, or you can provide feedback on any closed tickets in Partner Home. We sincerely value your partnership. Thank you,

Hello [supplier name], Thank you for reaching out regarding the status of this order. We understand your confusion and can provide additional information. The PO you have provided was issued as a replacement for PO XXXXX. Though our system will not allow a new order to be placed for an out of stock item, it will allow a replacement PO to be ordered off of an existing PO unless the item has been marked as discontinued. Depending on your stock situation, please action as follows: • If you cannot ship this replacement PO by the stated must-ship-by date, then please delay the order in Customer Orders > Dropship Orders • If this item is no longer available, then please mark the PO as out of stock and select "item discontinued". This will cancel the order. Additional information on managing order delays can be found here: https://partners.wayfair.com/help/2/article/1440 We want to make sure all your concerns are heard, so if this issue persists, please feel free to reach back out in this thread, and I will be happy to further assist. Applicable SOPs: Product Out of Stock SOP (DSC2S) - VCN
Text: Hi {SU name}/Team, Thank you for reaching out about this replacement part. I'm happy to clarify the process.The order delay process depends on whether or not the part can be shipped within our backorder SLA. Our current SLAs can be found on this Help Center article: https://partners.wayfair.com/help/2/article/207 If the replacement part can be shipped within our backorder SLA: You must delay the replacement part as "Part is out of stock". The date picker will allow you to select any date within our backorder SLA. If replacement parts cannot be shipped within our SLAs, you must complete one of the following two actions: Backorder the replacement part is "discontinued". This will cancel the replacement part & wayfair will offer the customer an alternate resolution. However, the item must be removed from our website before this option is available. If the item is not discontinued, but a replacement part cannot be shipped within SLA, you must backorder the replacement part as "whole unit needed". This will cancel the replacement part & order a replacement unit for the customer. Our Partner Home Help Center offers further information on replacement parts and the service levels, please see this article: https://partners.wayfair.com/help/2/article/2883 Thanks again for reaching out. This ticket is now marked as complete. If you do need further support with this issue, please add a comment to re-open. Help us improve by sharing your feedback. You will receive an email shortly with a survey, or you can provide feedback on any closed tickets in Partner Home. We sincerely value your partnership. Kind Regards

Template Use Case/Title: Supplier Shipping and Fulfillment Policy Education
Applicable SOPs: Problem with an Order (PWAO) SOP (DSC2S) Supplier Self Service Updates
Text: Hi [Supplier Team] I’m happy to review more information on our updated shipping and fulfillment policy. Beginning December 15th, 2025 a new compliance policy went into effect regarding shipping orders from the assigned warehouse the Wayfair system designates. Orders are routed based on inventory availability at the time the order is placed. To help support maintaining your success while minimizing financial impacts, please keep in mind the following: To ensure orders are routed to the correct warehouse: Keep warehouse hours, holidays, and contact info updated in Partner Home. Report accurate inventory at all warehouses. Warehouse assignments are based on supplier’s reported inventory and the customer’s delivery address. Regularly audit warehouse inventory accuracy and fulfillment reliability. Suppliers will face credit deductions for ship costs incurred when shipping from a warehouse other than the one assigned by Wayfair (including international shipments) that results in higher costs. If the risk of these deductions is not acceptable, please be aware the following options we are able to support at this time: Submit an order delay for the PO until you are able to ship it from the system-assigned warehouse. You can read more information about submitting an order delay here: https://partners.wayfair.com/help/2/article/1440 Select a new warehouse that has inventory available to fulfill this order; please note, this option will result in the aforementioned credit deductions. Please see the following help center resource for more information and the complete updated policy: https://partners.wayfair.com/help/2/article/3348 We want to make sure all your concerns are heard, so if this issue persists, please feel free to reach back out in this thread, and I will be happy to further assist. Otherwise, if I've resolved your concerns for the time being, I hope you have a great day! Help us improve by sharing your feedback. You will receive an email shortly with a survey, or you can provide feedback on any closed tickets in Partner Home. We sincerely value your partnership.
